title: Having a Cold and Fever 感冒发烧
scene: Mom带Tom去看医生，Tom感冒发烧了。

lines.en: Doctor, my son has a fever and a bad cough.
lines.zh: 医生，我儿子发烧了，咳嗽很厉害。

lines.en: How long has he been sick?
Let me check his temperature. It is thirty-eight degrees.
lines.zh: 我量一下他的体温。三十八度。

lines.en: Do not worry. It is a common cold.
Take this medicine three times a day after meals.
Does he need to stay home from school?
lines.zh: 他需要请假不去上学吗？

lines.en: Yes, rest at home for two days and drink more water.
lines.zh: 是的，在家休息两天，多喝水。
